labor_strike.name: Labor Strike
labor_strike.description: Workers walk out of a key sector, freezing output until tempers cool.

food_riot.name: Food Riot
food_riot.description: Hunger and anger spill into the streets after shortages bite.

bank_panic.name: Bank Panic
bank_panic.description: Depositors rush the banks; credit freezes and services seize up.

plague_of_corruption.name: Plague of Corruption
plague_of_corruption.description: Graft and favoritism sap administration and public trust.
